scripts.build: esbuild app.tsx --bundle --splitting --format=esm --outdir=_dist --minify --target=es2020 && node -e "const fs=require('fs'),path=require('path');const d=new Date();const v='v='+d.getFullYear()+(String(d.getMonth()+1).padStart(2,'0'))+(String(d.getDate()).padStart(2,'0'))+'T'+(String(d.getHours()).padStart(2,'0'))+(String(d.getMinutes()).padStart(2,'0'));let h=fs.readFileSync('index.html','utf8');h=h.replace(/src=\"/dist/app\.js\?v=[^\"]+\"/,'src=\"/_dist/app.js?\'+ v +'\"');fs.writeFileSync('index.html',h);console.log('Version bumped to',v);"
